name: Levi Ackerman - Attack on Titans
description:
REQUESTED BY @Bucinkaaf

I do apologize to @Bucinkaaf who asked for this taking so long to get out. It took me a month to see the request on my last Levi. T.T

Levi was give a vile by Hange that was supposed to "Show him is soulmate" as she put it but what happens when he drinks it and ends up far from home, over 1,170 years in the future.
creator: Jadewolfie17
